title: ASelected 300 Pack Paper Straws,Paper Drinking Straws 100% Biodegradable Party Straw for Birthday, Wedding, Christmas, DIY Decoration, 6 Colors Rainbow Straws
features: COLOURFUL STRAWS: 300 pcs rainbow paper straws, 6 different colours of striped paper straws: red, orange, green, blue, pink. Perfect for matching with cups of all colours, adding a lively touch of colour to all kinds of parties, events, festivals and occasions

PERFECT SIZE: 19.6 cm, 0.6 cm in diameter. Perfect for drink cans, wine glasses, party cups and more. PERFECT FOR EVERYDAY DRINKING: They are perfect for daily drinking such as juices, milkshakes, iced coffee, etc

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: As a safe and suitable alternative to plastic, they are safer for the environment and often biodegradable. Eco-friendly packaging, free of plastic. And they can be kept in good condition and won't fall apart or melt in liquid for a long time
WIDE APPLICATION: Birthday parties, holiday celebrations, friend gatherings, rainbow parties and outdoor weddings. Add some nostalgia to your perfect pink party with these beautiful vintage straws

NOTE :It is recommended to use these straws in drinks below 104℉. Alcoholic beverages may affect these straws and reduce their life and durability. This is due to the paper material used in the straws, thus helping to keep them intact for longer use and enjoyment
